title: polygala albowii
intro: Polygala albowii is a plant species, also known as the 'Albowii Polygala' or 'Yin Yang Hu', which belongs to the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). Traditionally, the Polygala albowii plant is used for its medicinal properties, including its potential to treat urinary tract issues, such as nocturia and enuresis, and its ability to help alleviate respiratory problems like bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties, which can help to clear mucus, reduce swelling, and increase urine production. In traditional Chinese medicine, Polygala albowii is often prepared into herbal teas, decoctions, or capsules, and is also used topically in the form of poultices or infusions.
